overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a circular Gothic-style divination classroom with stone walls, a central fire pit, and tables holding glowing crystal balls. A student in school robes enters from the right and walks across the room. Game engine footage with warm interior lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular divination classroom with crystal balls and central fire

events.description: student in robes enters the room from the right side
student exits the frame to the left side

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom from an elevated fixed position

notable_agents.action: student in school robes walking from right to left across the room

entered.detail: tall curved stone walls with Gothic architecture forming the circular perimeter
circular fire pit with flames in the center of the room
wooden tables holding glowing crystal balls arranged in a circle
tall arched windows with heavy red curtains allowing daylight to filter in
circular stained glass window in the ceiling casting colored light

segments.scene_description: A static view of a circular Gothic-style classroom with stone walls, a central fire pit, and tables arranged in a circle each holding a glowing crystal ball. Tall windows with red curtains line the walls and a stained glass skylight is visible above. A student in school robes enters from the right and walks across the room toward the left, passing the central fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a Gothic divination classroom as a lone figure traverses the mystical space. It begins with a wide perspective of the circular room, where stone walls are lined with tall windows and red curtains beneath a stained glass skylight. As the scene unfolds, the focus remains on the atmospheric interior, highlighting the glow of crystal balls resting on tables arranged around a central fire pit. The composition then shifts in dynamic energy as a student in school robes enters from the right, walking steadily across the room and passing the flickering flames of the fire before exiting toward the left.
